name: Rouladen
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound steaks to an even thickness and season with salt and pepper.
2. Spread mustard on each steak.
3. Add 2 strips of bacon and a generous amount of chopped onion to each steak.
4. Roll the steaks up tightly and secure with toothpicks.
5. Sauté the rolls in butter in a large skillet until browned all over.
6. Pour enough water into the pan to just cover the steak rolls.
7. Cover the pan and simmer for 90 minutes.
8. Make the gravy while the rouladen are cooking.
9. Serve covered with gravy.
